what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG vertical ellipsis icon made from three vertically aligned currentColor circles.
observations: Sets root fill to none and stroke to currentColor with round caps and joins.
Contains three circle elements centered at x=12 and y=6, 12, and 18.
Each circle has radius 1.4 and fill currentColor.
standouts: Three evenly spaced dots form a vertical menu icon.
The icon inherits color from currentColor.
The SVG is compact and inline-ready.
conventions: Follows common icon SVG sizing with a 24x24 viewBox.
Uses round stroke settings consistent with line-icon styling, even though the visible shapes are circles.
notes: A small themeable vertical-dots action/menu icon defined entirely as inline SVG geometry.
questions: Should the circles inherit the root stroke, or should they be fill-only dots?
purpose_vs_actual: The path/name suggests a vertical dots icon, and the SVG content matches that purpose.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable vertical overflow/menu glyph that adapts to surrounding text or icon color.
contribution: Contributes a compact, color-inheriting vertical ellipsis glyph suitable for overflow actions or secondary menu controls.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor SVG icon showing three vertically aligned circular dots.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing a vertical overflow or more-options menu in a themeable icon set.
